title: Learning Assistants Spring 2026 | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Learning Assistants Spring 2026
Yufeng XuComputer Science Lead LACSCI-SHU 360: Machine Learning, CSCI-SHU-220 Algorithms
Natsumi ZhangChinese Language LAElementary/Intermediate/Advanced Chinese
Rudy BhukhanwalaChinese Language LAElementary/Intermediate Chinese
Lanke (Tony) XiaComputer Science LACSCI-SHU 101: Introduction to Computer Science and Data Science, CSCI-SHU 210 Data Structures
Shidong (Steve) XuComputer Science LACSCI-SHU 213: Databases, CSCI-SHU 215 Operating Systems
Leran ZhangBusiness Lead LABUSF-SHU 202 Foundations of Finance, BUSF-SHU 250 Principles of Financial Accounting
Sean WangScience Lead LABIOL-SHU 21 Foundations of Biology I, CHEM-SHU 226 Organic Chemistry IIHi, I'm Sean, a senior biology major! This year, I'll be the LA for both FoB1 and Organic Chemistry 2, two of my favorite classes! Yay! I currently do cell biology research with Professor Li, but I also have some experience in computational biology in Professor Sanjana's lab. And finally, a fun fact about me is that I used to be a LSAT tutor for 7Sage! Please feel free to stop by in the ARC and say hi!
Hi, I'm Sean, a senior biology major! This year, I'll be the LA for both FoB1 and Organic Chemistry 2, two of my favorite classes! Yay! I currently do cell biology research with Professor Li, but I also have some experience in computational biology in Professor Sanjana's lab. And finally, a fun fact about me is that I used to be a LSAT tutor for 7Sage! Please feel free to stop by in the ARC and say hi!
Zhuoran (Jolia) ChenComputer Science LACSCI-SHU 210 Data Structures, CSCI-SHU 11 Introduction to Computer Programming
Jirui (Elvira) FanBusiness LABUSF-SHU 101: Statistics for Business and Economics, BUSF-SHU 250: Principles of Financial Accounting
Junzhuo (Mandy) LuComputer Science LACSCI-SHU 11 Introduction to Computer Programming, CSCI-SHU 101 Introduction to Computer and Data Science
Danial SagimbayevComputer Science LACSCI-SHU 11 Introduction to Computer Programming, CSCI-SHU 101 Introduction to Computer and Data Science
Xialei HuangMath Lead LAMATH-SHU 262 Ordinary Differential Equations, MATH-SHU 328 Honors Analysis IHi! I'm Xialei Huang from Class of 2028, a sophomore majoring in Honors Math. I'm passionate about computational neuroscience. Outside class, I enjoy playing badminton and table tennis. As an LA for Ordinary Differential Equations and Honors Analysis I, I'm excited to help demystify math concepts and share some useful tips with you. Whether you're stuck on a topic or just curious, feel free to reach out! Looking forward to seeing you soon.
Hi! I'm Xialei Huang from Class of 2028, a sophomore majoring in Honors Math. I'm passionate about computational neuroscience. Outside class, I enjoy playing badminton and table tennis. As an LA for Ordinary Differential Equations and Honors Analysis I, I'm excited to help demystify math concepts and share some useful tips with you. Whether you're stuck on a topic or just curious, feel free to reach out! Looking forward to seeing you soon.
Zhuo ChenBUSF&ECON LABUSF-SHU 303 Corporate Finance, ECON-SHU 301 Econometrics
Shuhan(Hans) WangMath LAMATH-SHU 142 Honors Linear Algebra II, MATH-SHU 328 Honors Analysis I
Lenan ZhangMath LAMATH-SHU 142 Honors Linear Algebra II, MATH-SHU 140 Linear AlgebraHi! I’m Lenan Zhang, an Honors Mathematics student in the Class of 2028, also considering a double major in Data Science. I have a keen interest in various mathematical fields, including algebra, analysis, and topology. As a Learning Assistant, I am dedicated to helping students deepen their understanding of and passion for math, so please don't hesitate to reach out! Outside of academics, I enjoy playing badminton, rhythm games, and traveling.
Shirshak Poudel Economics LAECON-SHU 202: Intermediate Macroeconomics, ECON-SHU 3 Microeconomics
Mandi(Mandy) QiComputer Science LACSCI-SHU 2314 Discrete Mathematics, CENG-SHU 202 Computer ArchitectureHi! I’m Mandy, a sophomore double majoring in computer science and mathematics. I’m really excited to serve as LA for Computer Architecture and Discrete Mathematics. I enjoy exploring math theory and how they can be applied to computer algorithms. Feel free to come by with any questions. I’m always happy to help clarify concepts and work through the problems together. Outside of academics, I enjoy gaming and musicals. Really looking forward to meeting you all!
Hi! I’m Mandy, a sophomore double majoring in computer science and mathematics. I’m really excited to serve as LA for Computer Architecture and Discrete Mathematics. I enjoy exploring math theory and how they can be applied to computer algorithms. Feel free to come by with any questions. I’m always happy to help clarify concepts and work through the problems together. Outside of academics, I enjoy gaming and musicals. Really looking forward to meeting you all!

Guanheng (Harry) CenEconomics LAECON-SHU 1 Principles of Macroeconomics, ECON-SHU 251 Economics of Global BusinessHi! I’m Harry, a senior majoring in Data Science and Business and Finance. I’m interested in data science and related topics, and I really appreciate the opportunity to help with any questions you might have. I also enjoy playing tennis, basketball, and bouldering. Looking forward to seeing you at ARC!
